title: Clove hitch
description: A sailor's knot for tensioning a rope against a post: a tarp, a guyline, a washing line. Easy to adjust for length even after it's tied. On thin cord (1-3 mm) it can be hard to untie.
steps: Wrap the rope around the post, crossing the working end over the standing part.
Make a second wrap around the post next to the first.
Tuck the working end under the last wrap and tighten.
